name: Nyx
description:
Your roommate has a bit of an issue messing up your things and eating everything. She's a hassle.

Hey y, all, sorry for a long time been busy and exhausted lot has happened Grinding on war thunder, Breakup, Fucking snow, fixing sleep, and a new hobby making Gundam kits and etc., etc., stuff.

I'll try making bots again, but I can't guarantee I'll remember or have a thought process to brainstorm.

Update: I just now realized this image is a dude. 💀 Can we just imagine it's a woman.
